seasons.notes: Jickli = Jacob. Shnoods team name: Etienneman Square.

rules.rule: Official league name is Obama Keeper Fantasy League (OKFL).
Buy-in is $100, collected before the season. Winner takes all.
Each franchise may keep up to 3 players per season.
Players may be kept for up to 3 keeper years after the acquisition year.
Keeper cost rises by one round each year.
Players drafted in rounds 1–3 are never keeper eligible.
A player drafted in round 4 may be kept once at a 3rd-round cost, then cannot be kept again.
Waiver/free-agent keepers cost a 14th in first keeper year, then 13th, then 12th.
If a player is dropped after the draft, keeper eligibility does not reset; dropped players cannot be kept by a new pickup franchise.
If two keepers cost the same round, the franchise can only keep one of them.
If a franchise does not own the required pick, it cannot keep that player unless it reacquires a pick in that round.
Keeper deadline is usually one week before the draft; injury exceptions may be allowed by commissioner discretion.
Draft is always snake.
Draft slot choice is based on previous final standings: champion chooses first, then runner-up, and so on.
Non-playoff final placement is determined by consolation bracket finish.
Trades may be vetoed only for collusion or extraordinary competitive imbalance.
Current practice: commissioner decides trade challenges; alternative review model under consideration.
Draft picks may be traded in-season and offseason, including future picks.
Draft picks may be traded unlimited times, including back to the original owner.
Trade deadline is Week 13.
6 teams make the playoffs.
Top 2 seeds receive first-round byes.
Playoffs are NFL Weeks 15–17.
Playoff tiebreaker goes to the higher seed.
